title: FRAME_DROPPED
description: ARG HORROR mod in minecraft that adds entity 303 as the main ?Villain?
body:
*Hint- Right Clicking on blocks, unusual blocks may make things happen.

WARNING- DO NOT DIE or LEAVE during events that are timed, like getting teleported to a dimension that teleports you back in a timer, or when an event happens that are timed or ends in a timer.

Rework:

Done.

Desync:

Incomplete.

Victims:

3?

When does it end?

Corporations are here.

Help me, I'm stuck?

What will you do?

![FrameDropped Official Logo- or something](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2a2a7037a4525f64b8e916744de2afe6a78b7f4.png)

                                  -Mod developed, created, and still in the works by Flenum

                                  -Designer, Coder, and VFX Maker - Flenum

                                  -Animator and Contributor - Obscurity
-This mod was inspired by The Broken Script, Wonderland, and From The Caves.

-Inspired by outside games such as Lucid Blocks.

-Inspired by content creators' ideas, such as 8BitRyan, The Librarian, and more.

Music For Stairs Dimension-

a winged folley by yeth_half

                    Mod also inspired by Entity 303, the myth, the legend, and the forgotten

               entity. Mostly revolves around Entity 303 and its victims. A subtle mod with not-so-loud jumpscares.
-Contains between 10 and 20 dimensions, not too big though, each one made by hand.

-Up to 30 or more events that include entities.

-The mod can kick you, and it can be buggy. It is still in the works.

-The mod has a built-in "Sanity" mode called "Desync."

-How it works-

           -The more the player does, such as killing or destroying things = +0.5 Desync

           -The player kills a special animal = +2 Desync

           -The more the player "fixes" things, such as breeding animals or killing monsters = -0.5 Desync

           -If the Desync is kept high, the events ramp up and cause more damage to you.

           -If the Desync is kept high and not treated, kicks can start to happen.
-The mod has passive events.

    -What this means-

            -At a random chance, the mod can make you stop sprinting if you are sprinting.

            -At random, the mod can make you stop crouching or holding Shift.
-The mod has hidden files.

IMPORTANT-

MOD DOES NOT CONTAIN VIRUSES, CANNOT CRASH YOUR PC, CANNOT DOWNLOAD ANYTHING, AND CANNOT INTERACT OUTSIDE OF THE GAME. Simple and plain.

ALSO - Don't, or try not to, leave during events, as it may break them or keep the event going. The events work on both the server and client, which basically means there is a timer. For example:

"Timer set: 20"

During that time, if the player leaves, the event may stay stuck, so please don't leave.

<Entity_303> Don't ever leave....

![settings for the stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/343ac1b7e2d82da320a37ac0feae1627ca99b765.png)

"fd/debug:dimension" - Teleports you out of dimensions if stuck in one.

"fd/debug:item" - Gives the "History Book" if lost.

"fd/debug:entity" - Despawns entities that may have bugged out.

 

 

My purpose for the mod:

  While making this mod, I wanted to bring back the joy of music and show how music can interact with the player and help make things scary. I wanted to bring music back to horror. Music is an important piece of horror, building tension and keeping the player on the lookout. So please let me know if the music needs work, or if it fits this experience. Thank you for playing.
-Entity 303

Special thanks to ALESHA <3
